info.title: Klabis Orienteering Club Management API
info.description:
RESTful API for managing orienteering club operations.

## Features
- Member registration and management
- HATEOAS-compliant with HAL+FORMS media type
- OAuth2 authentication and authorization
- RFC 7807 Problem Details for errors

## Authentication
Most endpoints require OAuth2 authentication. Use the 'Authorize' button to authenticate.

tags.name: Password Setup
tags.description: Password setup and account activation API

get.summary: List members with pagination and sorting
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of registered members with summary information (firstName, lastName, registrationNumber). Supports pagination (page, size) and sorting (sort=field,direction). Default: page=0, size=10, sort=lastName,asc. Allowed sort fields: firstName, lastName, registrationNumber. Returns HATEOAS links for navigation including pagination links (first, last, next, prev).

parameters.name: pageable
parameters.description: Pagination parameters: page (default=0), size (default=10, max=100), sort (default=lastName,asc). Example: ?page=0&size=20&sort=lastName,asc&sort=firstName,asc

200.description: Paginated list of members retrieved successfully

400.description: Invalid request - invalid sort field or page parameters

post.description: Creates a new member with personal information, contact details, and optional guardian information for minors. Automatically generates a unique registration number in format XXXYYSS (club code, birth year, sequence). Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

get.summary: List events with pagination and filtering
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of events. Supports filtering by status and sorting by various fields. Default: page=0, size=10, sort=eventDate,desc. Allowed sort fields: id, name, eventDate, location, organizer, status.

200.description: Paginated list of events retrieved successfully

post.description: Creates a new event in DRAFT status. Event coordinator ID is optional. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.
Transitions event from DRAFT to ACTIVE status.
Transitions event from ACTIVE to FINISHED status.

get.description: List all registrations for an event. SI card numbers are not included for privacy protection.

post.description: Register the authenticated member for an event with SI card number. Only allowed for ACTIVE events. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

403.description: Forbidden - user must have a member profile to register for events

delete.description: Unregister the authenticated member from an event. Only allowed before the event date.

400.description: Cannot unregister on or after event date

post.description: Requests a new token if the previous one expired
Sets the user's password and activates the account

400.description: Invalid request (validation failed, bad token, password mismatch)

get.description: Retrieves detailed member information by ID including personal information, contact details, and guardian information if applicable. Returns HATEOAS links for navigation.

patch.description: Updates member information with PATCH semantics (partial update). Supports dual authorization: members can edit their own information (limited fields), users with MEMBERS:UPDATE authority can edit any member (all fields). Only provided fields are updated; null/missing fields keep existing values. Member-editable fields: email, phone, address, dietaryRestrictions. Admin-only fields: firstName, lastName, dateOfBirth, gender, chipNumber, identityCard, medicalCourse, trainerLicense, drivingLicenseGroup. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

400.description: Validation error - invalid request data or empty update

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

get.description: Retrieves detailed event information by ID. Returns HATEOAS links based on event status.

patch.description: Updates event information. Only allowed for DRAFT and ACTIVE events. Returns HATEOAS links for resource navigation.

400.description: Validation error or invalid state transition

get.description: Get the authenticated member's registration details including SI card number.
Validates a token before showing the password setup form

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The plain text token from the email link

RegisterMemberRequest.description: Member registration data including personal information, contacts, and optional guardian

MemberRegistrationResponse.description: Member registration response with HATEOAS links

TokenRequestRequest.description: Request for a new password setup token

TokenRequestResponse.description: Response for password setup token request

message.example: If your account is pending activation, you will receive an email with a new setup link.

ErrorResponse.description: Error response for password setup API errors

message.description: Error message describing what went wrong

SetPasswordRequest.description: Password setup request containing token and new credentials

token.description: The plain text token from email

password.description: The new password (minimum 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

passwordConfirmation.description: Password confirmation must match the password field

UpdateMemberRequest.description: Partial update request - only include fields to update

MemberSummaryResponse.description: Member summary with essential information and HATEOAS links

OAuth2.description: OAuth2 authentication with Spring Authorization Server
